title: Who we are
content:
## Who we are , Mō mātou
Find out about the Tertiary Education Commission Te Amorangi Mātauranga Matua and Tahatū Career Navigator.

## Who we are Ko wai mātou ,
When we say ‘we’, we mean the Tertiary Education Commission Te Amorangi Mātauranga Matua. We are the New Zealand Government agency that runs Tahatū.
We are the kaitiaki of Aotearoa New Zealand’s tertiary education and careers system. Our purpose is to shape a dynamic system that delivers lifelong learning and equips students, communities and employers for success.
Find out more – Tertiary Education Commission website

## About Tahatū Mō Tahatū ,
We created Tahatū to make it easy for everyone to make career plans and decisions. Tahatū aims to provide information and tools to help you:
- understand the career possibilities for your future
- have the confidence to take action
- build resilience for the changing world of work.

## Who Tahatū is for Mō wai mā a Tahatū? ,
Tahatū is designed for everyone in Aotearoa New Zealand, including:
- students of all ages
- people who want to get into work
- people who want to change their work
- teachers and career advisers.

## Contact us Whakapā mai ,
We hope you enjoy exploring the information and tools on Tahatū. If you have any feedback, please let us know.
